retry_messages:
The slice is blocked on continuity, not gameplay. Reopening the saved `phase11-safe-grinder` session at `http://127.0.0.1:5173/jones-vibes/` landed on fresh onboarding at `CYCLE 1` with `START THE RUN`, and both `localStorage` and `sessionStorage` were empty before any clicks. I stopped there to avoid creating a non-authoritative Week 11 replay.

I recorded the blocker in [run-state.json](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/run-state.json), [current-phase.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/current-phase.md), [phase-11-audit-progress.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-audit-progress.md), [audit-log-persona-a.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/audit-log-persona-a.md), and the canonical Week 11 slice file [week-11.md](/home/silwerdivan/code/jones-vibes/docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-11.md).
